title: Statistical Methods for Biomedical Data
description: We develop statistical methods for high-dimensional, structured, and survival outcomes.
Our work emphasizes inference, reproducible analysis, and practical tools.
alt: Power curves from microbiome statistical method evaluation

title: Multi-omics and Epigenetics
description: We analyze DNA methylation, genetic variation, and other omics data.
We link molecular profiles with clinical phenotypes.
alt: Omics analysis scatter plot from biomedical research

title: Statistical Genetics and Rare Variant Analysis
description: We study genetic architecture and rare variant signals in sequencing data.
Our work includes variant aggregation and reproducible association analysis.
alt: Cropped Fig. 2 regional GWAS panels from Genome Biology whole-genome sequence analysis of pulmonary function and COPD

title: Respiratory Disease and COPD Data Science
titleKo: 호흡기 질환 및 COPD 데이터 사이언스
description: We study respiratory disease using genetic, imaging, omics, and clinical data.
Topics include lung function, emphysema, mucus plugging, and disease progression.
alt: Chest CT examples of mucus plugs from COPD research

title: Biomedical AI and Prediction Modeling
description: We develop and evaluate prediction models for biomedical and clinical outcomes.
Topics include survival prediction, interpretable machine learning, and model validation.
alt: Cropped Fig. 5 Kaplan-Meier survival curves from a gut microbe-derived extracellular vesicle study

title: Environmental Health Data Science
description: We apply statistical methods to environmental health and policy data.
Topics include study design, survey analysis, sampling, and stakeholder perception.
alt: Network visualization used as a research thumbnail for environmental health data science

relatedWork.label: Smart safety equipment certification criteria project
